prestazioni: Engine: EP6CDTR (1.6L THP270) – Full forged internals including Manley I-beam connecting rods, Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (8.5:1 compression), and ACL Race Series bearings for 350+ hp reliability with a Garrett GT3076R turbo upgrade (0.82 A/R, 62mm compressor, 56 trim) on a custom 3.5-inch stainless downpipe with GESI 400-cell catalytic converter.

Fuel System: Injector Dynamics ID1050x fuel injectors paired with a Syvecs S6Plus standalone ECU (OEM ECU bypass with full flex-fuel and launch control mapping), AEM 340lph in-tank fuel pump, and Radium Engineering dual catch can system with -10AN lines for crankcase ventilation.

Suspension & Handling: Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (custom valving for RCZ R chassis), SuperPro poly bushings (full rear subframe and front control arm kit), and AP Racing CP9430-100 355mm 4-piston front brake calipers with Ferodo DS2500 pads and Goodridge 600-series stainless steel brake lines.
estetica: Aero: Liberty Walk LB Works RCZ R widebody kit (carbon fiber front splitter, rear diffuser, and overfenders) with custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap and gloss black accents on the OEM LED taillights.

Wheels: Work Emotion CR Kiwami 2 19x9.5 +15 (front) and 19x10.5 +25 (rear) in Hyper Silver, paired with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (255/35/19 front, 285/30/19 rear) and Project Kics R40 6x139.7 wheel spacers for flush fitment.

Interior: Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber backs) with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses, Momo Mod.77 steering wheel (350mm, suede), and custom Alcantara headliner with red contrast stitching, retaining the OEM RCZ R aluminum pedals and boost gauge pod integrated into the A-pillar.
